text.title: Testing with pytest Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply testing-pytest. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Add `pytest>=8` + `pytest-mock` + (optional) `pytest-asyncio`, `pytest-xdist`, `coverage` to deps.
step.description: Input: pyproject.toml. Action: Edit deps, run `pip install`.. Output: deps updated.

step.name: Create top-level `conftest.py` with project-wide fixtures (`db`, `client`, `tmp_repo`).
step.description: Input: fixture inventory. Action: Author fixtures with right scopes per r2.. Output: conftest.py.

step.name: For each module, author `test_<name>.py` with function-style tests.
step.description: Input: module under test. Action: Write tests; use parametrize per r3.. Output: test files.
step.note: Step 3. Required input: module under test.

step.name: Configure coverage in `[tool.coverage.run]` + `[tool.coverage.report]`; gate at threshold.
step.description: Input: test files. Action: Edit pyproject.toml.. Output: coverage config.

step.name: Wire CI: `pytest -n auto --cov --cov-fail-under=<N>` and (if async) `asyncio_mode = strict`.
step.description: Input: coverage config. Action: Update CI YAML.. Output: CI gate.
